pref_name: Constantine VII Porphyrogenitus, Emperor of the East, 905-959
desc: Fourth Emperor of the Macedonian dynasty of the Byzantine Empire, reigning from 6 June 913 to 9 November 959. He was the son of Emperor Leo VI and his fourth wife, Zoe Karbonopsina, and the nephew of his predecessor Emperor Alexander. 17 May 905–9 November 959
